channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇹🇭 Thailand's Former PM Thaksin Shinawatra Released from Prison
item.description: Influential former prime minister released on parole after eight months. Hundreds greeted the 76-year-old billionaire as he left Bangkok's Klong Prem Central Prison.

item.title: 🦠 French Passenger Shows Hantavirus Symptoms During Repatriation Flight
item.description: A French national developed symptoms while being airlifted from the virus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius. Five evacuees quarantined in Paris hospital.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada Sees Biggest Military Recruitment Surge in 30 Years
item.description: Canadian army growing at pace not seen in decades amid global conflicts and rising nationalism after Trump referred to Canada as the "51st state".

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Nobel Laureate Narges Mohammadi Granted Bail, Transferred to Hospital
item.description: Iranian authorities released the ailing human rights activist on bail amid growing concern over her deteriorating health in prison.

item.title: 🇱🇻 Latvian Defense Minister Resigns After Drone Incursions
item.description: Latvian Prime Minister Evika Silina requested the resignation of Defense Minister Andris Spruds after drones violated the country's airspace, saying he had lost her trust and "that of the public."

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey Pursues ICBM Development with Ballistic Missile Breakthrough
item.description: Turkey touts propellant breakthrough for Yildirimhan long-range ballistic missile program, signaling ambitions for intercontinental capability.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel Warns Gaza War Will Continue Despite Ceasefire Talks
item.description: Israeli officials say military operations in Gaza will not stop as hostage negotiations stall and Hamas remains entrenched in parts of the enclave.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Wanted Polish Minister Flees Hungary to US
item.description: Former Polish government minister wanted on corruption charges fled to the United States after Hungary refused to extradite him, saying the country won't protect people wanted elsewhere.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Confirms Dates for Trump State Visit to Beijing
item.description: Chinese officials confirmed the US president will visit Beijing this month for high-stakes talks amid the ongoing Iran war and economic tensions.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russia Breaks 3-Day Ceasefire as Strikes Kill 1, Injure 19 Across Ukraine
item.description: Russian forces launched drone and missile attacks across Ukraine despite a declared 3-day ceasefire, killing one civilian and wounding 19 others.

item.title: 🇵🇱 Poland Finds Spy Drone Near Russia's Kaliningrad Border
item.description: Polish authorities discovered a reconnaissance drone near the border with Russia's Kaliningrad exclave amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🇮🇱 WSJ: Israel Built and Defended Secret Iran War Base in Iraq
item.description: Wall Street Journal reveals Israel established a covert military installation in Iraq for operations against Iran, marking a major escalation in regional warfare.

item.title: 🇮🇷 WSJ: Iran's Supreme Leader MIA as Negotiators Need Him Most
item.description: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has been notably absent from public view at a critical moment for US-Iran ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇸🇦 Saudi Aramco Profits Jump 25% Despite Middle East Conflict
item.description: Saudi oil giant reported 25% jump in Q1 profit after successfully shifting oil exports from the blocked Strait of Hormuz to alternative routes.

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkey Touts Propellant Breakthrough for Long-Range Ballistic Missile
item.description: Turkey announced a significant advancement in solid propellant technology for its Yildirimhan ballistic missile program, advancing its ambitions for extended-range capabilities.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Kremlin Expects US Envoys Witkoff and Kushner 'Quite Soon'
item.description: Russian officials anticipate the arrival of Trump's special envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner for Ukraine-related discussions.

item.title: 🇭🇺 Hungary's New PM Apologizes to Those Wronged Under Orban
item.description: Hungary's new prime minister issued a public apology to citizens harmed during Viktor Orban's 16-year rule, signaling a break from the authoritarian past.

item.title: 🇸🇾 Syria's Atef Najib Faces at Least 10 Charges in Landmark Trial
item.description: Former Syrian official faces multiple charges including corruption and crimes against humanity in one of the first major trials of the post-Assad era.

item.title: 🌎 US-China Telescope Rivalry Reaches South American Skies
item.description: The US has pressed Argentina and Chile to review Chinese telescope projects in the Andes, raising concerns about dual-use technology and scientific research.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Rejects Iran's Response to US Peace Proposal
item.description: President Trump dismissed Iran's counter-proposal for ending the war as "totally unacceptable." Iran demanded lifting of US naval blockade and compensation for war damage.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Medics Among 51 Killed in Israeli Attacks on Lebanon in 24 Hours
item.description: Israeli attacks are intensifying in southern Lebanon, with 552 killed since the "ceasefire" started on April 16. Medical personnel among the casualties.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Putin Hints at Ending Russia's War in Ukraine
item.description: Amid a US-backed ceasefire, Putin signals peace talks could progress. The Russian leader sees potential for Ukraine negotiations but condemns Western backing for Zelensky.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump Says US Will Not Allow Iran to Reach Enriched Uranium
item.description: US president says Washington has Iran's nuclear material "surveilled" and will "blow up" anyone who gets near it amid ongoing ceasefire negotiations.

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia Kills Three Ukrainians, Accuses Kyiv of Truce Violations
item.description: Russia claims Ukraine has committed more than 1,000 violations since the three-day truce came into effect. Three Ukrainian civilians killed in Russian strikes.
